steps.instruction: Enter the roundabout and take the 2nd exit onto Rue Soufflot
steps.name: Rue Soufflot

steps.instruction: Turn left onto Rue de Rennes
steps.name: Rue de Rennes

steps.instruction: Turn right onto Rue de Grenelle
steps.name: Rue de Grenelle

steps.instruction: Turn right onto Allée de Beaupassage - Antoine Alléno
steps.name: Allée de Beaupassage - Antoine Alléno

steps.instruction: Turn left onto Rue du Bac
steps.name: Rue du Bac

steps.instruction: Arrive at your destination, straight ahead
